3117990.name: Daydream Mosaics 5: Crimson Veil
3117990.description:
Return to the enchanting Twin Worlds and join Juliette and her companions on their quest to find Raven and lift the sinister curse that has befallen the Crimson World. Solve intricate nonogram puzzles to collect precious crystals and rejuvenate ancient Crimson sanctuaries. Along the way, meet unexpected allies and unlock a variety of captivating mini-games, including jigsaw puzzles, spot-the-difference, and hidden object challenges. Dive into this magical adventure and help bring life back to the Crimson World!

  • 120 Nonogram Levels
  • 3 Sanctuaries to rebuild
  • 9 Jigsaw Puzzles
  • 9 Hidden Object Scenes
  • 9 Spot the Differences Scenes
